def: Pertaining to, or of, ivy; full of ivy.
A short blunt arrow for killing birds without piercing them.Hence: Anything which smites without penetrating. Shak.
See the Note under Her, pr.
Such things, in respect to infants, lunatics, and marriedwomen, as are requisite for support suitable to station.
To gaze beyond; to exceed in sharpness or persistence of seeingor of looking; hence, to stare out of countenance.
A bringing into action; movement. Bp. Pearson.
A substance regarded as an anhydride of meconinic acid,existing in opium and extracted as a white crystalline substance.Also erroneously called meconina, meconia, etc., as though it were analkaloid.
